title: DecorRack Sink Protector Mat for Kitchen Sink, 30 x 28 cm Plastic Sink Grid, Scratch Guard, Sink Mat Protector for Stainless Steel or Ceramic Sink, Dishwasher Safe (White)
features: DURABLE & SAFE PLASTIC DESIGN – Made of premium-quality plastic, this kitchen sink protector mat provides long-lasting protection against stains, scratches, and damage while being gentle on your ceramic or stainless steel sink.
PROTECTS DISHES & SINK SURFACE – The cushioned grid design prevents plates, cups, and pans from chipping or cracking, while the raised feet lift the mat for improved drainage and airflow.
OPTIMAL WATER DRAINAGE – Features a central drain hole that allows continuous water flow and prevents standing water, keeping your sink clean and hygienic throughout daily use.
MULTIFUNCTIONAL USE AS DRAINING RACK – Use as a drying mat or dish drainer tray; perfect for drying kitchen utensils directly in the sink without taking up counter space.
EASY TO CLEAN & DISHWASHER SAFE – Simply rinse under running water or place in the dishwasher for effortless cleaning; ideal for maintaining a tidy and hygienic kitchen sink area.
description: Keep your kitchen sink clean, protected, and organised with the DecorRack Sink Protector Mat , designed to safeguard both your sink and your dishes. Made from durable, high-quality plastic, this sink protector grid prevents scratches, stains, and damage to your ceramic or stainless steel sink while providing a cushioned surface for delicate items such as plates, glasses, and cookware. The open centre drain hole ensures optimal water drainage and hygiene by allowing water to flow directly into the drain. Its raised feet promote airflow, reducing moisture build-up and keeping your sink fresh and dry. This multifunctional kitchen sink mat also doubles as a dish drainer tray, letting you dry your dishes directly in the sink and saving valuable countertop space. Compact, lightweight, and dishwasher safe , the DecorRack sink protector is easy to clean and maintain — the perfect kitchen sink accessory for daily use. Whether your sink is small, ceramic, or stainless steel , this protective sink liner offers reliable performance and long-lasting quality you can trust.
